etymology.description: 枕(枕) (zhěn, "pillow") indicates the object used to support the head during sleep. 頭(頭) (tóu, "head") specifies the part of the body the object supports, emphasizing that this pillow is indeed for resting the head.
etymology.interpretation: 枕(枕) (zhěn, "pillow") inherently denotes an object used for support during rest, notably under the head. 頭(頭) (tóu, "head") clarifies the focus of support, indicating the primary function of a pillow during sleep or rest. Together, they clearly refer to an item designed to support the head.

examples.chinese: 我找不到我的枕头(我找不到我的枕頭)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zhǎo bù dào wǒ de zhěntou.

examples.chinese: 她买了一个新的枕头(她買了一個新的枕頭)。
examples.pinyin: Tā mǎi le yí gè xīn de zhěntou.

examples.chinese: 枕头很柔软(枕頭很柔軟)，使我能睡得更好(使我能睡得更好)。
examples.pinyin: Zhěntou hěn róuruǎn, shǐ wǒ néng shuì de gèng hǎo.
examples.english: The pillow is very soft, which helps me sleep better.
